name: ALICE (Actabl) Hotel Operations Platform API
what_it_does: ALICE (Actabl) hotel operations platform REST API for guest request management, work order tracking, housekeeping operations, and staff communication for hotels and resorts. Enables AI agents to manage guest request creation and routing for automated guest service fulfillment, handle work order assignment and completion tracking for hotel maintenance operations automation, access housekeeping task management and room status updates for rooms division automation, retrieve preventive maintenance scheduling and asset tracking for hotel engineering automation, manage concierge request and vendor communication for guest experience automation, handle in-room dining and amenity delivery request for F&B service automation, access staff messaging and inter-department communication for hotel team coordination automation, retrieve guest satisfaction and request resolution analytics for service quality intelligence, manage vendor and supplier request routing for hotel procurement operations, and integrate ALICE with Oracle OPERA, Agilysys, and Hotel Effectiveness for full Actabl hospitality operations ecosystem.
use_cases: Routing guest requests from concierge agents
Managing work orders from maintenance agents
Tracking housekeeping tasks from rooms division agents
Scheduling preventive maintenance from engineering agents
not_for: Hotel reservation and PMS functionality (use OPERA or Agilysys)
Hotel financial accounting and reporting (use M3 or ProfitSword)
Large enterprise facility management (use IBM Maximo or ServiceMax)
best_when: A full-service hotel or resort wanting AI agents to automate guest request fulfillment, maintenance work order management, housekeeping task coordination, and staff communication within ALICE as the hotel operations platform.
avoid_when: GUEST PRIVACY IN AUTOMATED REQUEST ROUTING: Automated guest request routing must not expose guest room number, stay dates, or personal preferences to unauthorized hotel staff; automated work order creation and routing must apply minimum necessary guest information principle; full guest profile access in work order context creates unnecessary PII exposure in operations systems. GUEST REQUEST SLA COMMITMENT ACCURACY: Automated guest request fulfillment SLA commitments (e.g., 'towels delivered in 10 minutes') must account for actual staff availability and pending request queue depth; automated SLA promise without current queue visibility creates guest promise failures at peak occupancy. MAINTENANCE SAFETY HOLD BEFORE ROOM RELEASE: Automated room status release from maintenance hold requires safety verification sign-off; automated housekeeping room assignment before maintenance completion verification creates guest check-in into unsafe or unready room.

auth.notes: ALICE uses API key and OAuth authentication. REST API with JSON. New York City HQ (ALICE Technologies, pre-acquisition). Founded 2013 by Justin Effron and Alexander Shashou. Acquired by Actabl (formerly Hotel Solutions Partnership). Actabl platform includes ALICE (guest ops), Hotel Effectiveness (labor), and ProfitSword (analytics). 2,500+ hotel properties. Guest messaging, work orders, housekeeping, and concierge. OPERA and Agilysys PMS integration. Competes with HotSOS (Amadeus), Quore, and Beekeeper for hotel operations.

pricing.free_tier_limits: No free tier — per-property annual subscription
pricing.paid_tiers: Annual per-property subscription; guest services, staff operations, and preventive maintenance modules; Actabl platform bundle option
pricing.notes: New York NY / Atlanta GA (Actabl). Founded 2013. Actabl acquisition. 2,500+ hotel properties. Guest operations and hotel communications. Per-property annual subscription.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per API key; request and work order submission throttled; webhooks for request status and work order events

known_agent_gotchas: GUEST REQUEST QUEUE DEPTH FOR REALISTIC SLA PROMISES: Automated guest request fulfillment SLA responses must account for current pending request queue depth by department; automated 'delivered in 10 minutes' promises during peak occupancy with full request queues create systematic SLA failure and guest satisfaction impact; implement queue-aware SLA promise logic

MAINTENANCE HOLD ROOM SAFETY CLEARANCE BEFORE HOUSEKEEPING ASSIGNMENT: Automated housekeeping room assignment must check maintenance hold status; rooms with open maintenance work orders (plumbing, electrical, HVAC) must be cleared by engineering supervisor before housekeeping assignment; automated assignment without maintenance clearance creates guest check-in into unsafe room

GUEST PII MINIMUM NECESSARY IN WORK ORDER ROUTING: Automated work order creation from guest request must include minimum necessary guest information (room number, request type) without full guest profile; automated work order systems with full guest profile access create unnecessary PII exposure for housekeeping and maintenance staff

Actabl ALICE vs Hotel Effectiveness cross-product data handoff — ALICE housekeeping task management and Hotel Effectiveness housekeeping productivity tracking may both be deployed at same property; automated data flow between ALICE room assignments and Hotel Effectiveness productivity tracking requires explicit integration configuration; without integration, housekeeping data exists in two systems without unified view

Mobile app offline capability for field staff — ALICE staff mobile app supports offline work order viewing and status updates; automated work order dispatch must handle cases where field staff devices sync offline updates when reconnecting; implement conflict resolution for status updates submitted while offline

PMS two-way room status integration — ALICE housekeeping status (clean, dirty, inspected) should sync with OPERA or Agilysys PMS room status in real-time; automated two-way PMS integration requires correct OPERA OHIP or Agilysys API credential configuration; one-directional sync creates room status discrepancy between operations and front desk systems
agent_readiness.security_notes: Hotel operations. SOC2. API key/OAuth. US. Guest request, room status, and staff communication data.

security_score_components.security_notes: Hotel operations. SOC2. API key/OAuth. US. Guest PII and operational data.
